calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: July 28, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Cathy Mosbrucker, Esq. appeared for plaintiff George Ballard Company.
Alan Fong, Senior Collections Representative for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Brent Marshall Anderson, individually and d/b/a Brent M. Anderson-Contractors.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff George Ballard Company, and against defendant Brent Marshall Anderson, individually and d/b/a Brent M. Anderson-Contractors, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,941.59.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,827.81.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $405.00, for a total of $9,174.40.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than July 30, 2008.

Ntc Of Mtn For Order For Deemed Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions And Req. For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $590 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Order To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions And Req For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on May 9, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on May 9, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
